doc_title_en: Notification regarding revision (increase) of dividend forecast for fiscal year ending March 2026

key_facts.reason_jp: 長期経営方針における株主還元方針と当期業績等を総合的に勘案

summary_en: Final dividend raised ¥10/share to ¥65 (from ¥55 prior forecast). Combined with interim dividend of ¥50, annual dividend reaches ¥115/share for FY3/26, marking 11th consecutive year of dividend increases. Next fiscal year annual dividend forecast at ¥130/share (interim ¥65).
summary_jp: 期末配当を10円増配し65円に修正（前回予想55円）。中間配当50円と合わせた年間配当は115円/株で、11期連続増配となる見通し。次期年間配当予想は130円/株（中間65円）。
tag_en: Dividend hike - ¥65/share final (¥115 annual) - FY3/26 - 11th consecutive increase
tag_jp: 増配 - 期末65円（年間115円）- 2026年3月期 - 11期連続増配
